form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Sandown over 515m in 29.86. Followed that up with a minor placing over 512m at this track at OPEN a week ago. Close to the speed and boxed on well at her latest run. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (29.40) when second at this track in a OPEN. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on March 29 over 512m at this track behind Gorringe beaten one length (29.55) in a OPEN. Others preferred on this occasion.
